privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real movie metadata dataset from GitHub (sundeepblue/movie_rating_prediction) containing 5043 rows of IMDB movie data with 28 columns. After filtering null gross/budget values, 3891 rows remain. The genres column uses pipe '|' as delimiter with 4410 rows containing multiple genres. Primary genres are extracted correctly without pipe characters, yielding 17 unique genres. Data spans decades from 1920 to 2010 (title_year 1916-2016), supporting the decade binning requirement. The task requires Power BI Matrix visual (rows=Primary_Genre, columns=Decade, values=avg gross) and Scatter Chart (X=budget, Y=gross, Legend=Primary_Genre).
